title: Ender beetles
description: A mod that adds a new prehistoric food source
body:
Ender beetles is a mod that adds 2 new mobs, the Ender beetle itself and an ender mite queen. Here is the list of features the mod adds:

**Ender Beetles:** Ender beetles do not spawn naturally, and their dormant eggs can be found across the end highlands, they need and Incubator to revive, and need to be hand fed their favorite food to grow into a strong and large Ender beetle! Beetles Lumber around slowly, occassionally laying to rest. Be wary, as they have a fierce hatred of enderman! Feed them Endermite husks to breed them naturally.

**Incubator:** A simple warming pad made of endstone, a ghast tear, and blaze rod. When an egg is placed on top it should hatch in the following minute.

**Endermite Queen:** Endermite queens spawn in a hive that occassionally spawns through the highland and midlands, They constantly give birth to endermites every minute or so, giving a renewable source of endermite husks!

**Harmony berries:** They spawn in wild patches in the end, when replanted and grown fully they drop 2-3 berries. They can be eaten for the levitation effect, crafted with a beetle steak to get an amazing meal, or used to grow a grub into a pupa!

**Beetle Club:** A powerful weapon, dealing a whopping 15 damage and applying nausea and slowness on hit! Though do note it is extremely slow to use.
